\section{Introduction}

\subsection{Document Presentation}
This document constitutes Deliverable \#2 for the Systems Engineering course. Its purpose is to detail the requirements specification and functional analysis for the \textbf{Plate Resonance (PR)} subsystem, integrated within the global \textbf{SWAID} project.

\subsection{References}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Project Proposal 13: SWAID - Standing Waves Acoustic Interactive Demonstrator - Plate Resonance (PR).
    \item Systems Engineering Course Slides (FEUP).
    \item &[ Additional documentation/standards &].
\end{itemize}

\subsection{Terms and Definitions}
\begin{description}
    \item[SWAID] Standing Waves Acoustic Interactive Demonstrator.
    \item[PR] Plate Resonance (Plate Resonance Subsystem).
    \item[CP] Chladni Plate.
    \item[HI] Human Interface (Human Interface Subsystem).
\end{description}
